title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 2026: How to watch
summary: Samsung’s next Galaxy Unpacked event is just around the corner, and the company is expected to take the wraps off a bunch of new devices. Samsung is expected to reveal some new wearables as well, including a new Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.
